---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Yoon"
date: "2026-03-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
dir.create("D:/housing_data/3_clean", showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
files <- list.files(
  "D:/housing_data/paid_gov_data",
  pattern = "pp-20(18|19|20|21|22|23|24|25)",
  full.names = TRUE
)

ppd_raw <- rbindlist(lapply(files, fread, header = FALSE), fill = TRUE)

setnames(ppd_raw, c(
  "Transaction_ID",
  "Price",
  "Date_of_Transfer",
  "Postcode",
  "Property_Type",
  "Old_New",
  "Duration",
  "PAON",
  "SAON",
  "Street",
  "Locality",
  "Town_City",
  "District",
  "County",
  "PPD_Category_Type",
  "Record_Status"
))

ppd <- copy(ppd_raw)

ppd[, Postcode := as.character(Postcode)]
ppd[, PAON := as.character(PAON)]
ppd[, SAON := as.character(SAON)]
ppd[, District := as.character(District)]

ppd[is.na(Postcode), Postcode := ""]
ppd[is.na(PAON), PAON := ""]
ppd[is.na(SAON), SAON := ""]
ppd[is.na(District), District := ""]

ppd[, Postcode_clean := toupper(gsub("\\s+", "", trimws(Postcode)))]
ppd[, PAON_clean := toupper(gsub("[^A-Z0-9]", "", trimws(PAON)))]
ppd[, SAON_clean := toupper(gsub("[^A-Z0-9]", "", trimws(SAON)))]
ppd[, District_std := toupper(trimws(District))]
```

```{r}
london_boroughs <- toupper(c(
  "City of London",
  "Barking and Dagenham",
  "Barnet",
  "Bexley",
  "Brent",
  "Bromley",
  "Camden",
  "Croydon",
  "Ealing",
  "Enfield",
  "Greenwich",
  "Hackney",
  "Hammersmith and Fulham",
  "Haringey",
  "Harrow",
  "Havering",
  "Hillingdon",
  "Hounslow",
  "Islington",
  "Kensington and Chelsea",
  "Kingston upon Thames",
  "Lambeth",
  "Lewisham",
  "Merton",
  "Newham",
  "Redbridge",
  "Richmond upon Thames",
  "Southwark",
  "Sutton",
  "Tower Hamlets",
  "Waltham Forest",
  "Wandsworth",
  "Westminster"
))

ppd_london <- ppd[District_std %in% london_boroughs]

cat("PPD London rows:", nrow(ppd_london), "\n")
```
```{r}
ppd_london[, is_flat := Property_Type == "F"]

ppd_london[, key_flat := paste0(Postcode_clean, "_", SAON_clean)]
ppd_london[, key_house := paste0(Postcode_clean, "_", PAON_clean)]

fwrite(ppd_london, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_london_clean.csv")
```


```{r}
base_dir <- "D:/housing_data/all-domestic-certificates (1)"

all_dirs <- list.dirs(base_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
london_dirs <- all_dirs[grepl("domestic-E09", basename(all_dirs), ignore.case = TRUE)]

epc_files <- file.path(london_dirs, "certificates.csv")
epc_files <- epc_files[file.exists(epc_files)]

length(epc_files)

epc_raw <- rbindlist(lapply(epc_files, fread, fill = TRUE), fill = TRUE)

dim(epc_raw)
```

```{r}
wanted_cols <- c(
  "LMK_KEY",
  "POSTCODE",
  "ADDRESS1",
  "ADDRESS2",
  "ADDRESS3",
  "CURRENT_ENERGY_RATING",
  "CURRENT_ENERGY_EFFICIENCY",
  "POTENTIAL_ENERGY_RATING",
  "POTENTIAL_ENERGY_EFFICIENCY",
  "BUILDING_REFERENCE_NUMBER",
  "PROPERTY_TYPE",
  "BUILT_FORM",
  "INSPECTION_DATE",
  "LODGEMENT_DATE",
  "TOTAL_FLOOR_AREA",
  "NUMBER_HABITABLE_ROOMS",
  "CONSTRUCTION_AGE_BAND",
  "FLOOR_LEVEL"
)

wanted_cols <- wanted_cols[wanted_cols %in% names(epc_raw)]

epc_use <- copy(epc_raw[, ..wanted_cols])

for (v in intersect(c("POSTCODE", "ADDRESS1", "ADDRESS2", "ADDRESS3"), names(epc_use))) {
  epc_use[, (v) := as.character(get(v))]
  epc_use[is.na(get(v)), (v) := ""]
}
```


```{r}
epc_use[, Postcode_clean := toupper(gsub("\\s+", "", trimws(POSTCODE)))]
epc_use[, ADDRESS1_std := toupper(trimws(gsub(",", "", ADDRESS1)))]
epc_use[, ADDRESS2_std := toupper(trimws(gsub(",", "", ADDRESS2)))]
epc_use[, ADDRESS3_std := toupper(trimws(gsub(",", "", ADDRESS3)))]
```


```{r}
epc_use[, SAON_clean := ""]

epc_use[
  grepl("^FLAT", ADDRESS1_std),
  SAON_clean := str_replace_all(
    str_extract(ADDRESS1_std, "^FLAT\\s*[A-Z0-9]+"),
    "\\s+",
    ""
  )
]

epc_use[
  SAON_clean == "" & grepl("^APARTMENT", ADDRESS1_std),
  SAON_clean := str_replace_all(
    str_extract(ADDRESS1_std, "^APARTMENT\\s*[A-Z0-9]+"),
    "\\s+",
    ""
  )
]

epc_use[
  SAON_clean == "" & grepl("^MAISONETTE", ADDRESS1_std),
  SAON_clean := str_replace_all(
    str_extract(ADDRESS1_std, "^MAISONETTE\\s*[A-Z0-9]+"),
    "\\s+",
    ""
  )
]

epc_use[
  SAON_clean == "" & grepl("^UNIT", ADDRESS1_std),
  SAON_clean := str_replace_all(
    str_extract(ADDRESS1_std, "^UNIT\\s*[A-Z0-9]+"),
    "\\s+",
    ""
  )
]

epc_use[
  SAON_clean == "" & grepl("^ROOM", ADDRESS1_std),
  SAON_clean := str_replace_all(
    str_extract(ADDRESS1_std, "^ROOM\\s*[A-Z0-9]+"),
    "\\s+",
    ""
  )
]

epc_use[is.na(SAON_clean), SAON_clean := ""]
```

```{r}
epc_use[, PAON_clean := ""]

# first try ADDRESS2 if present
epc_use[
  ADDRESS2_std != "" & grepl("^\\d+[A-Z]?", ADDRESS2_std),
  PAON_clean := str_extract(ADDRESS2_std, "^\\d+[A-Z]?")
]

# then ADDRESS3 if still blank
epc_use[
  PAON_clean == "" & ADDRESS3_std != "" & grepl("^\\d+[A-Z]?", ADDRESS3_std),
  PAON_clean := str_extract(ADDRESS3_std, "^\\d+[A-Z]?")
]

# then ADDRESS1 for house-type rows
epc_use[
  PAON_clean == "" & grepl("^\\d+[A-Z]?", ADDRESS1_std),
  PAON_clean := str_extract(ADDRESS1_std, "^\\d+[A-Z]?")
]

epc_use[, PAON_clean := toupper(gsub("[^A-Z0-9]", "", trimws(PAON_clean)))]
```


```{r}
epc_use[, key_flat := paste0(Postcode_clean, "_", SAON_clean)]
epc_use[, key_house := paste0(Postcode_clean, "_", PAON_clean)]
```


```{r}
epc_fix2 <- copy(epc_use)

if ("LODGEMENT_DATE" %in% names(epc_fix2)) {
  suppressWarnings(epc_fix2[, LODGEMENT_DATE := as.IDate(LODGEMENT_DATE)])
  setorder(epc_fix2, key_flat, key_house, -LODGEMENT_DATE)
} else if ("INSPECTION_DATE" %in% names(epc_fix2)) {
  suppressWarnings(epc_fix2[, INSPECTION_DATE := as.IDate(INSPECTION_DATE)])
  setorder(epc_fix2, key_flat, key_house, -INSPECTION_DATE)
}
```


```{r}
ppd_london <- fread ("D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_london_clean.csv")


ppd_flats  <- ppd_london[Property_Type == "F"]
ppd_houses <- ppd_london[Property_Type != "F"]

cat("PPD flats :", nrow(ppd_flats), "\n")
cat("PPD houses:", nrow(ppd_houses), "\n")
```

```{r}
epc_flat_unique  <- epc_fix2[key_flat  != "" & !duplicated(key_flat)]
epc_house_unique <- epc_fix2[key_house != "" & !duplicated(key_house)]

cat("Unique EPC flat keys :", nrow(epc_flat_unique), "\n")
cat("Unique EPC house keys:", nrow(epc_house_unique), "\n")
```

```{r}
flat_match_rate <- mean(ppd_flats$key_flat %in% epc_flat_unique$key_flat)
house_match_rate <- mean(ppd_houses$key_house %in% epc_house_unique$key_house)
overall_match_rate <- (
  sum(ppd_flats$key_flat %in% epc_flat_unique$key_flat) +
  sum(ppd_houses$key_house %in% epc_house_unique$key_house)
) / nrow(ppd_london)

cat("Flat match rate :", round(flat_match_rate, 4), "\n")
cat("House match rate:", round(house_match_rate, 4), "\n")
cat("Overall match   :", round(overall_match_rate, 4), "\n")
```

```{r}
flats_joined <- merge(
  ppd_flats,
  epc_flat_unique,
  by = "key_flat",
  all.x = FALSE
)

houses_joined <- merge(
  ppd_houses,
  epc_house_unique,
  by = "key_house",
  all.x = FALSE
)

ppd_epc_joined <- rbindlist(
  list(flats_joined, houses_joined),
  fill = TRUE
)

dim(ppd_epc_joined)
```


```{r}
fwrite(ppd_flats, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_flats.csv")
fwrite(ppd_houses, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_houses.csv")

fwrite(epc_flat_unique, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/epc_flat_unique.csv")
fwrite(epc_house_unique, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/epc_house_unique.csv")

fwrite(ppd_epc_joined, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_epc_joined.csv")
saveRDS(ppd_epc_joined, "D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_epc_joined.rds")


test <- fread("D:/housing_data/3_clean/ppd_epc_joined.csv")

names(test)
```


```{r}
cat("\nRows:\n")
cat("PPD London total :", nrow(ppd_london), "\n")
cat("PPD houses       :", nrow(ppd_houses), "\n")
cat("PPD flats        :", nrow(ppd_flats), "\n")
cat("Joined houses    :", nrow(houses_joined), "\n")
cat("Joined flats     :", nrow(flats_joined), "\n")
cat("Joined total     :", nrow(ppd_epc_joined), "\n")

cat("\nProperty types in final joined data:\n")
print(table(ppd_epc_joined$Property_Type))

cat("\nSummary CURRENT_ENERGY_EFFICIENCY:\n")
print(summary(ppd_epc_joined$CURRENT_ENERGY_EFFICIENCY))

cat("\nMissing values in final joined data:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(ppd_epc_joined)))

cat("\nFinal columns:\n")
print(names(ppd_epc_joined))
```
